title: Metrics history index
description: Sorted list of release-time snapshots stored under data/metrics-history/. Maintained by scripts/snapshot_metrics.py; never hand-edited. Sort order is semver descending so the newest release is always first.

schema_version.description: Index schema version. Bumped when the entry shape changes.

version.description: Release version this snapshot was captured under (matches VERSION at the time of capture).

schemaVersion.description: schema_version of the snapshot payload (matches metrics.schema.json schema_version).

generatedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp the snapshot was generated by the build pipeline (carried verbatim from metrics.json).

useCases.description: counts.useCases at the time of capture; cheap-to-read trend signal for release notes.

file.description: Filename of the snapshot relative to data/metrics-history/.
